title: gaultheria adenothrix
intro: Gaultheria adenothrix is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. This plant is commonly known as the Taiwanese mountain tea, and its leaves are used for medicinal purposes. The medicinal properties of Gaultheria adenothrix include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Gaultheria adenothrix can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for use in traditional medicine.
